description: Composite risk scoring — three inputs (compositeRisk, assurance, action requirement), two-axis decision. Weights live in policy, not code.

compositeRisk._note: weights must sum to 100; compositeRisk = Σ(component × weight) / 100

networkRisk._note: additive sub-weights, capped at 100 — NOT a sum-to-100 set. ip_abuse: score × multiplier (max 60)
